name: @engineeringood/athena-tree-sitter-grammar
description: Tree-sitter grammar for Athena source syntax UX (syntax-only; not a semantic authority).

scripts.clean: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('build', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.test: tree-sitter generate && tree-sitter test && node --test scripts/*.test.mjs
